/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lv2host_module.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmuse_lv2host_module.so -o libmuse_lv2host_module.so CMakeFiles/lv2host_module.dir/moc_lv2host.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lv2host_module.dir/lv2host.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules -llilv-0 -lsord-0 -lserd-0 -lserd-0 /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a ../libs/midnam/libmuse_midnam_module.so ../libs/midi_controller/libmuse_midi_controller_module.so ../libs/xml/libmuse_xml_module.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19 ../libs/mpevent/libmuse_mpevent_module.so ../libs/evdata/libmuse_evdata_module.so ../libs/memory/libmuse_memory_module.so ../libs/sysex_helper/libmuse_sysex_helper_module.so
